comments.text:
Discovered 2026-06-24 during /orchestrate-epic mutagen-33b. `mix spec.check` is red on main (b31354f, the SpecLedEx-migration commit) on two subjects, blocking spec.check as a clean gate:

1. mutagen.ast.v1 — verification command `grep -rn 'defp alias_to_module\|defp find_module_body' lib/mutagen_ex/` matches nothing (functions renamed/removed; the spec's verification command is stale).
2. mutagen.cli.v1 — `mix test test/integration/archive_install_test.exs --include archive_integration` fails: archive-installed `mix mutagen` aborts with runtime_load_failed (`telemetry.app` no such file) — archive packaging missing the telemetry dep, or a real archive-bootstrap bug.

AGENTS.md (lines 49-55) declares spec.check a non-optional local gate, so main is currently violating its own stated gate. mutagen-33b was delta-gated around these (compile + mix test + own-subject verification + no NEW spec.check findings) to avoid blocking unrelated correctness work.

title: mix spec.check red on main: mutagen.ast stale grep + mutagen.cli archive telemetry
